---
name: Bug report
about: The skill led an agent to a wrong or failing skl action
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What the skill says**
Quote the line(s) in `skl/SKILL.md` or `docs/reference/cli.md`.

**What skl actually does**
The real CLI behavior (command, flag, exit code, error message).

**How to reproduce**
```bash
skl ...
```

**skl version**
Output of `skl --version`.

**Anything else**
